user.description: Upload a Flipper Zero IR signals file (.ir). A button entity will be created for each command in the file.

data_description.name: Name for this remote (used for the device).
data_description.ir_file: A Flipper Zero IR signals file exported from the Flipper ecosystem.

error.invalid_ir_file: The uploaded file is not a valid Flipper IR signals file. See the error log for additional details.
